scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:client
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm ci && npm run build:vercel
scripts.vercel-build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cp -r dist/* ../ 2>/dev/null || xcopy dist\* ..\ /E /I /Y 2>nul || robocopy dist .. /E
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
